component.name: Antiloop Chiru
component.summary: Native Markdown Viewer with sidebars and outline

description.p: A premium, offline-first Markdown viewer built using GTK4 and Libadwaita. Features dual sidebars for file browsing and outline navigation, as well as Mermaid diagram rendering.
Release v1.2.0 with elementary OS compatibility and UI refinements.

ul.li: Renamed application to Antiloop Chiru for unique AppCenter identity.
Added native Granite integration for elementary OS styling.
Scoped Flatpak sandbox filesystem access to home directory (--filesystem=home:ro).
Restricted X11 fallback permissions for Wayland security.
Bundled custom symbolic icons for sidebar controls across all desktop environments.

description.p: Initial stable release of Antiloop Markdown Viewer.

ul.li: Premium Markdown rendering using GitHub styling.
Dual sidebars for file browsing and document outline.
Document search (Ctrl+F) with top-to-bottom match counting.
Page-fit PDF print layout (Ctrl+P) with 2cm margins.
Directory monitoring to automatically refresh file list.
